name: New Mexico Style Barbecued Salmon
recipeInstructions:
1. Two hours before cooking, brush the salmon fillets on both sides with the sauce and refrigerate.
2. Prepare a wood or charcoal fire and allow it to burn down to embers.
3. Grill the salmon for 2 to 3 minutes on each side, until lightly browned.
4. Brush again with barbecue sauce and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
